hero.headline: When *Randy* shows up, it gets done right
hero.subheadline: Ask around Macon — we're the painters who come back if it's not perfect. That's just how we work.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: From lakeside docks to living rooms
services_section.subheading: Every surface painted with care and precision

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Walls, ceilings, trim — every room handled with attention to detail. We protect your furniture and clean up completely.

services.title: Exterior House Painting
services.description: Full exterior painting that stands up to Georgia weather. Prep work included to make your paint job last.

services.title: Deck & Dock Painting
services.description: Specialized in waterfront structures. We replace bad boards and paint for lasting protection against moisture.

services.title: Touch-Up & Repairs
services.description: Small jobs matter too. Scratches, dings, and imperfections fixed right the first time.

about.heading: Randy and the Top Quality team
about.body: We've been painting homes and businesses around Macon with one simple promise: if it's not done right, we come back and make it so. Our customers stick with us for years because we answer the phone, show up on time, and never leave a job unfinished. That's what quality means to us.

reviews.name: Lori L.
reviews.text: Randy painted our entire lakeside dock and boathouse, even replaced some bad boards. Friendly, prompt, and it looks amazing now!

reviews.name: Ray R.
reviews.text: Used Randy for years on all my painting projects. If something isn't 100% right, he comes back and fixes it. True professional.

reviews.name: Ben H.
reviews.text: Impressed with the quality and attention to detail. Punctual, respectful, and handled everything with care from start to finish.

reviews.name: Kathryn K.
reviews.text: Quality work at fair pricing — gets the job done right every time!

cta.heading: Ready to see the Top Quality difference?
cta.body: Call Randy today for your free estimate. We'll walk through your project and give you an honest quote with no surprises.
